name: XMAX Starry 4 Wax Cup
summary: Expand your product offering with the XMax Starry 4 Wax Cup —a dedicated concentrate insert designed for the XMax Starry 4 Vaporiser.
description: Expand your product offering with the XMax Starry 4 Wax Cup —a dedicated concentrate insert designed for the XMax Starry 4 Vaporiser. This accessory enables compatibility with wax and extract materials, transforming the device into a versatile all-in-one solution. Engineered specifically for the Starry 4 (Starry V4), this wax cup fits securely within the chamber to provide a contained space for concentrates. It supports efficient heating and consistent performance with wax and extract materials. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
